content.full_text:
August 28, 1992

Fair Political Practices Commission
Technical Assistance
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, Ca 95804

Dear Sirs:

Enclosed is a copy of the Norco News, a newspaper published in our City and owned and operated by a Council Candidate, Lou Oliva.

I recently had a phone conversation with Alice Hughes regarding filing obligations for expenditures for this candidate and I was to receive Regulation 18225 regarding expenditures. To date I have not received this regulation.

As you can see in this paper there is an article regarding her candidacy, soliciting donations, and referring to a committee, as yet I have received no committee filing information.

Please let me know if there is any problems with this activity, as other candidates are asking me regarding her using the paper in this manner.

Sincerely Yours,

Dianna M. Higdon, CMC
City Clerk
City of Norco

dh
